INBOtheme 0.5.7
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Available themes in INBOtheme
  • Changelog

Available themes in INBOtheme

Thierry Onkelinx

Source: vignettes/themes.Rmd
themes.Rmd

Introduction

This vignette gives a short introduction on the INBOtheme package. The INBOtheme package provides a few themes for ggplot2. This vignette demonstrates the look and feel of the themes by showing several plots. Many of the figures in this vignettes are taken from the examples from the ggplot2 package.

The ggplot2 package must be loaded prior to INBOtheme.

library(ggplot2)
library(INBOtheme)
library(colorblindr)

Available colours

Palettes

inbo_palette

vlaanderen_palette

nara_palette

Simulate effect of colourblindness on the perception of palettes

inbo_palette

Simulation of deutan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of protan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of tritan model of colorblindness.

Desaturated colours.

vlaanderen_palette

Simulation of deutan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of protan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of tritan model of colorblindness.

Desaturated colours.

nara_palette

Simulation of deutan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of protan model of colorblindness.

Simulation of tritan model of colorblindness.

Desaturated colours.

Available themes

Default: theme_inbo 

theme_set(theme_inbo())
switch_colour(inbo_steun_blauw)

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient2()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_point() + geom_errorbar() + scale_colour_discrete

theme_inbo with transparant background

theme_set(theme_inbo(transparent = TRUE))
switch_colour(inbo_steun_blauw)

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient2()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_point() + geom_errorbar() + scale_colour_discrete

theme_vlaanderen2015 

theme_set(theme_vlaanderen2015())
switch_colour(vl_darkyellow)

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient2()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_point() + geom_errorbar() + scale_colour_discrete

theme_vlaanderen2015 with transparant background

theme_set(theme_vlaanderen2015(transparent = TRUE))
switch_colour(vl_darkyellow)

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient2()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_point() + geom_errorbar() + scale_colour_discrete

theme_elsevier 

theme_set(theme_elsevier(12))
switch_colour("black")

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient2()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_point() + geom_errorbar() + scale_colour_discrete

theme_nara 

theme_set(theme_nara(12))
switch_colour(inbo_hoofd)

geom_boxplot()

geom_violin()

geom_histogram()

geom_histogram() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient() + facet_grid()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_gradient()

geom_point() + scale_colour_gradient()

geom_text() + geom_point() + facet_wrap()

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with categorical data

geom_histogram() + scale_fill_discrete() with ordinal data

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with categorical data.

geom_density() + scale_colour_discrete() with ordinal data.

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_point() + geom_smooth() + scale_colour_discrete() + scale_fill_discrete()

geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradient()
